speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Describing a sequence
questions: What did you do yesterday, in order?
When did your family move to your current home?
speaking.sampleAnswer: First, I finished my homework. After that, I called my friend, then we came together at the park. My family moved here ten years ago.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — Describe a memorable trip

cueCard.topic: Describe a memorable trip you took.
bullets: and explain why you remember it

speaking.sampleAnswer: Two years ago, I visited Hue with my classmates. First, we explored the old citadel, then we took a lot of photos. We didn't have a map at first, so we got lost. Finally, a kind local helped us. I remember this trip because everything turned out fine in the end.
